raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "lighter_box (top)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The lighter box is stacked on top of the darker box, with all sides exposed and enough clearance for both arms to approach from the left and right without colliding with the table or the darker box.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is securely held between the two end-effectors; the darker box remains on the table, now uncovered but still stationary."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_right_of_darker_box",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the lighter box and the area to the right of the darker box on the table is clear of obstacles and provides sufficient space (≥30×30 cm).",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is placed stably on the table to the right of the darker box and released; the darker box is now fully accessible from all sides."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker_box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is unobstructed on top and has at least 5 cm clearance on both lateral sides for the arms to engage; the robot’s arms are free after releasing the lighter box.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is firmly held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly off the table, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The lighter box is stacked on top of the darker box, with all sides exposed and enough clearance for both arms to approach from the left and right without colliding with the table or the darker box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is securely held between the two end-effectors; the darker box remains on the table, now uncovered but still stationary.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the lighter box and the area to the right of the darker box on the table is clear of obstacles and provides sufficient space (≥30×30 cm).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is placed stably on the table to the right of the darker box and released; the darker box is now fully accessible from all sides.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is unobstructed on top and has at least 5 cm clearance on both lateral sides for the arms to engage; the robot’s arms are free after releasing the lighter box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is firmly held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly off the table, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
